extraction.one_line_summary: KUNG Stefan won the 12.7km opening TT by 6 seconds over EVENEPOEL, taking 11 seconds out of SHEFFIELD in the second half despite trailing at intermediate.
tactical_patterns: KUNG Stefan gained entire winning margin in uphill finishing section, flipping 1-second deficit at 7km check into 11-second advantage.
SHEFFIELD Magnus faded badly on uphill finale despite dominating first half, exposing weakness in power-to-weight finishes for American.

rider_signals.KUNG Stefan: positive: Won home TT despite trailing at intermediate, suggesting superior pacing strategy and climbing power for uphill finishes
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: 6 seconds down first race post-COVID, competitive but not dominant form against specialist KUNG
rider_signals.SHEFFIELD Magnus: negative: Lost 12+ seconds in final 5.7km uphill section after leading at intermediate, poor weight/power ratio on gradients
rider_signals.BISSEGGER Stefan: negative: European TT champion notably slower than expected, form question for EF's Swiss rider on home roads
